city.title: Inner City
city.subtitle: Build your city, one habit at a time
city.emptyMessage: Tap an empty plot or use Auto Build to start!
city.thrivingMessage: Your city is thriving! Keep building to expand!
city.defaultMessage: Tap plots to build, tap buildings to upgrade
city.tipTapEmpty: Tap an empty plot to build a new building
city.tipTapExisting: Tap an existing building to upgrade it
city.tipPinch: Pinch to zoom in and out of your city
city.tipDrag: Drag to pan around and explore your city
city.tipDoubleTap: Double tap to reset the view
city.tipAutoBuild: Use Auto Build to quickly fill your city
city.tipEarnTokens: Earn tokens by completing daily habits

habits.title: Daily Habits
habits.noHabitsHint: Tap the + button to create your first habit
habits.celebrationBody:
Every habit completed today.
You're on a roll!
habits.notCreatedYet: This habit was not created yet
habits.tipSwipeRight: Swipe right on a habit to complete it
habits.tipSwipeFurther: For progress habits, swipe further for more. Flick to fill completely
habits.tipLongPress: Long press a habit for options (reset, edit, delete)
habits.tipQuitStart: Quit habits start completed each day — you're succeeding by not doing it
habits.tipQuitTap: Tap a quit habit to mark that you slipped up. Tap again to undo
habits.deleteConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.

stats.title: Stats
stats.subtitle: Your progress
stats.noHabits: No habits yet. Add some to see your stats!

settings.exportDataSubtitle: Save a backup of all your data
settings.importConfirmMessage: This will replace all existing data with the backup. Are you sure?
settings.importSuccessMessage: Your data has been restored. Please close and restart the app for changes to take effect.
settings.rateAppSubtitle: Leave a review on the store
settings.shareMessage: Check out Inner City - build your city one habit at a time!
settings.resetCityWarning: This will permanently destroy all placed buildings. Your tokens will be kept. This action cannot be undone.
settings.resetHabitDataWarning: This will permanently delete all habits and their history. Your city and tokens will be kept. This action cannot be undone.

habitForm.buildHint: Build: Work toward completing a goal
habitForm.quitHint: Quit: Track avoidance or staying under a limit
habitForm.targetError: Please enter a valid number (1 or greater)
habitForm.timesPerWeekDesc: Flexible - complete any days you choose

building.autoBuildDesc: Automatically place random buildings on empty plots.
building.notEnoughTokens: Not enough tokens. Complete habits to earn more!
building.demolishConfirmMessage: This will destroy this building and refund {{count}} token{{plural}}. This cannot be undone.
building.spendAllMessage: This will spend {{cost}} tokens to build {{count}} random building{{plural}}. This cannot be undone.
